user.title: Battery System — Required
user.description: Select your battery state-of-charge sensor and enter battery details.

export_window.title: Export Bonus Window — Required
export_window.description: Configure your energy retailer's export bonus window and rates.

solar_forecast.title: Solar Forecast — Required
solar_forecast.description: Select your solar forecast sensor. Forecast.Solar and Solcast formats are auto-detected.

optional_tariffs.title: Additional Tariff Periods — Optional
optional_tariffs.description: Add free import windows, peak rates, or grid-charging windows. Leave blank to skip.

data.grid_charging_enabled: Enable grid charging during cheap windows

optional_consumption.title: Home Consumption — Optional
optional_consumption.description: Select a consumption sensor to learn your load patterns from history.

optional_weather.title: Weather Integration — Optional
optional_weather.description: Improves forecast accuracy by adjusting solar confidence based on weather conditions.

optional_battery_rates.title: Inverter Rate Limits — Optional
optional_battery_rates.description: Configure max charge, discharge, and export power limits for your inverter.

error.entity_not_found: The selected entity was not found. Make sure it exists and is available.

data.bridge_to_fallback_time: Fallback bridge-to time (if no forecast data)
